migration.approval: Explicit AUD remediation requested by the human repository owner on 2026-07-14; this records evidence and does not grant runtime governance approval.
migration.reason: Attribute the decision record to the change author so the approving architect remains independent from production of the evidence they approve.
migration.surface: architecture example evidence and approval separation
